overall.description: Game engine footage from GTA V showing a first-person perspective walking along the shoulder of the Los Santos Freeway. The camera moves steadily forward past an overhead highway sign and various traffic including military convoys and civilian vehicles, approaching a distant overpass with the city skyline visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder beneath overhead sign gantry

events.description: camera passes behind the large concrete sign support pillar temporarily blocking the view
military convoy including trucks and humvees passes by on the highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt shoulder of the freeway next to high-speed traffic

notable_agents.action: military truck with camouflage pattern driving east on the highway
black SUV following the military convoy at high speed

entered.detail: large green overhead highway sign structure spanning the freeway
green highway sign with white text reading Los Santos Fwy and directional arrows for East and West
thick cylindrical concrete pillar supporting the overhead sign
tall palm trees visible on the hillside to the left of the highway
distant downtown buildings visible through the atmospheric haze
metal guardrail separating the shoulder from the embankment

segments.scene_description: The segment begins beneath the Los Santos Freeway overhead sign gantry with military vehicles passing by on the highway. The camera walks forward along the dirt shoulder, passing the concrete support pillar while palm trees and the distant city skyline remain visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway stretch with grassy roadside embankment

events.description: vegetation on the right embankment becomes denser with flowering bushes and tall grass

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway shoulder with the overpass visible ahead in the distance

notable_agents.action: red box truck driving along the left lanes of the highway

entered.detail: highway overpass structure visible in the distance spanning across the road

segments.scene_description: Having passed the overhead sign, the camera continues along the open highway stretch with a grassy embankment on the right. The overpass bridge becomes visible in the distance while traffic continues to flow on the left, and the city skyline appears slightly closer ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approach to overpass with dense roadside vegetation

events.description: passing a street light pole on the right side that temporarily blocks the view
approaching the overpass bridge structure as it looms larger in the frame

agents.ego_description: walking toward the overpass with dense vegetation on the right and continuous traffic on the left

notable_agents.action: white RV camper driving along the highway
yellow utility truck driving along the highway

entered.detail: tall metal street light pole along the highway shoulder

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera approaching the overpass bridge as it grows larger in the frame. The camera passes a street light pole on the right while various vehicles including an RV and utility truck pass by on the highway. The vegetation on the embankment remains dense with bushes and wildflowers as the overpass structure dominates the view ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a highway shoulder that transitions from the shadow of an overhead gantry toward a looming concrete overpass. It begins beneath the Los Santos Freeway sign gantry as military vehicles stream past on the highway and the camera moves along the dirt shoulder past a concrete support pillar. As the camera clears the overhead structure, the view opens up to a stretch of road flanked by a grassy embankment, with the distant city skyline gradually drawing closer. The scene then shifts toward the approaching overpass bridge, passing a street light pole while an RV and utility truck flow by on the left. Finally, the camera closes in on the massive bridge structure as the surrounding vegetation becomes a dense mix of bushes and wildflowers.
